$comment: Pull-rate constants for sealed Pokemon products, by era. Sourced from community pull-rate trackers (Just In Basements, r/PokeInvesting megathreads, official set spec sheets). Used to compute expected chase-card value per box / ETB / bundle. Multipliers are 'how many of the chase card you expect from one product on average'. Tune as new sets release.

scarlet-violet.notes: SAR/SIR ~1:36 per pack, hyper-rare ~1:90. Top-chase per box ~0.7 expected hits across SAR+SIR pool.

sword-shield.notes: Alt-art VMAX/V ~1:72, full-art trainer ~1:36. Lower chase density than SV era.

xy-and-earlier.notes: Older sets have looser pull-rate data. Values are approximate; sealed value here is driven more by scarcity than EV.
